properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was running wild fell in love with the chase I've been up and down and all over the place Wasting all my days and nights Never feeling satisfied Putting on a smile I was keeping it fake But there's no imitating what I've found in Your grace All the things I left behind Are shadows now I've seen the light

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In my head and my soul My heart my all I know that I know know know know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Never never have I ever Ever found a love so good, so good Never never am I ever Ever getting over living with you Nothing will change it All I can say is Never never have I ever Ever found a love so good, so good

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've got a million reasons why I can't be the same You've got me looking forward never turning my gaze For ever God it's You and I Together till the end of time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your Love is patient, love Is kind Your Love is never hard to find Forever I am Yours and You're mine All right, All right

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Never have I ever no Never have I ever no
